content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Press the red ___ on the keyboard to delete the text you just typed.
distractor_rationale: a screen displays information but cannot be pressed to perform a delete action
a cable connects devices and is not pressed to delete text
a speaker produces sound and is not pressed to delete text

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She used her phone ___ to take a photo of the sunset from the balcony.
distractor_rationale: a battery stores power and cannot be used to take a photo
a charger supplies power to a device and cannot take photos
a signal is a wireless connection, not a tool for taking photos

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom turned on his ___ and opened a spreadsheet to check the sales figures for last month.
distractor_rationale: a printer produces paper copies but cannot be turned on to open a spreadsheet
a router manages network connections and does not open spreadsheets
a projector displays images on a wall and is not used to open spreadsheets

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: You need to ___ on the blue link to open the registration form on the website.
distractor_rationale: typing means entering text with a keyboard, which does not open a link
scrolling moves the page up or down but does not activate a link
uploading sends a file to a server and is not the action used to open a link

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The fitness ___ on her phone counts her steps every day and reminds her to drink water.
distractor_rationale: a file stores data but cannot count steps or send reminders by itself
a folder organises files and cannot actively count steps or send reminders
an update is a software improvement, not a tool that actively tracks fitness

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She writes a weekly ___ about healthy recipes and posts new articles every Monday morning.
distractor_rationale: a podcast is an audio programme, not a written format with articles
a channel is used for video content, not written articles posted weekly
a profile is a personal page on a social network, not a site with written articles

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Please ___ your laptop to the office Wi-Fi before you join the video meeting.
distractor_rationale: charging supplies power to the battery and does not link the laptop to a Wi-Fi network
restarting shuts down and reboots the device but does not link it to a network
printing produces a paper copy and has nothing to do with joining a Wi-Fi network

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The company stores all customer ___ on secure servers so that personal information cannot be accessed by anyone outside the organisation.
distractor_rationale: design refers to the visual layout of a product, not the personal information stored on servers
code refers to programming instructions, not the personal records of customers stored on servers
content refers to published material such as text or videos, not private personal records kept on secure servers

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The developer wrote the ___ for the new payment feature and then tested it carefully to make sure there were no errors.
distractor_rationale: data is a set of stored values, not the programming instructions that a developer writes for a feature
a device is a physical piece of hardware, not something a developer writes for a software feature
design refers to the visual appearance of a product, not the programming instructions written to make a feature work

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The team spent three months working on the ___ of the new website, choosing colours, fonts, and the layout of each page.
distractor_rationale: a download is the act of transferring a file to a device, not the process of choosing colours, fonts, and layouts
data refers to stored information or statistics, not the visual planning of colours, fonts, and page layouts
digital is an adjective describing electronic technology, not a noun that describes the visual planning of a website

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She pressed the power ___ on her laptop to turn it on.
distractor_rationale: a screen is a display surface, not something you press to power a device on
a cable is a wire used for connection, not a physical control you press
a folder is a storage location for files, not a physical part of a laptop

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom used his phone's ___ to take a photo of the meal before eating it.
distractor_rationale: a speaker produces sound and cannot take photos
a charger supplies power to a battery and has no function in capturing images
a keypad is used for typing or entering numbers, not for taking photos

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She used a fitness ___ on her phone to count her steps and track how many calories she burned each day.
distractor_rationale: a blog is a website where people write articles, not a tool that counts steps or tracks calories on a phone
code refers to programming instructions and is not something a user opens and uses directly for fitness tracking
a device is a piece of hardware such as a phone or watch, not the software that runs on it and counts steps

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The hotel room had no Wi-Fi signal, so Mark could not ___ his tablet to the internet to check his emails.
distractor_rationale: download means to transfer a file from the internet to a device, but you must already be connected before you can download anything
click refers to pressing a mouse button or tapping a link, not establishing a network connection
design means to plan or create the appearance of something, which has no relation to joining a network

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The hospital stores all patient records in ___ form so that doctors can access and update them instantly from any computer on the network.
distractor_rationale: electric describes something powered by electricity, such as an electric car or light, and does not collocate with 'form' to mean stored as computer files

electronic can describe devices that use electronics, but 'electronic form' in this medical-records context is less precise than 'digital form', and more importantly the sentence specifies access via computer network, which specifically points to digital storage rather than a general electronic format
data is a noun referring to information itself, not an adjective that can modify 'form' to describe the format in which records are stored

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She took a ___ of the birthday cake and sent it to her friends.
distractor_rationale: click refers to pressing a button, not creating an image
code refers to programming instructions, not a captured image
download means to transfer data from the internet, not to take a picture

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Tom pressed the red ___ on the remote control to turn off the television.
distractor_rationale: screen is a display surface that you look at, not something you press to operate a device
cable is a wire that connects devices, not a control you press
camera is a device for taking pictures, not a part of a remote control you press

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Maria uses a ___ every day to write emails and search for information online.
distractor_rationale: a printer only produces paper copies and cannot be used to write emails or search online
a speaker only plays sound and cannot be used to write emails or search online
a camera takes photographs and cannot be used to write emails or search online

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: You need to ___ the music file to your phone before you can listen to it without an internet connection.
distractor_rationale: upload means to send a file from your device to the internet, which is the opposite direction
connect means to link devices together, not to transfer a file onto a phone for offline use
delete means to remove a file permanently, which contradicts the goal of listening to it

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: James writes a ___ about cooking, and he posts new recipes on it every week for his readers.
distractor_rationale: an app is a software application, not a personal website where someone posts written recipes regularly
a device is a piece of hardware such as a phone or tablet, not a platform for publishing written content
a channel is typically used for video content, not for posting written recipes with regular text entries

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The new fitness ___ on her phone tracks how many steps she walks each day and shows her progress in a chart.
distractor_rationale: a blog is a website for publishing written content, not a tool that tracks steps and displays charts on a phone
a cable is a physical wire used to connect devices, not a software program that monitors daily activity
a button is a physical or on-screen control to press, not a program that tracks steps and shows progress

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: All the photos from the wedding were stored as ___ files, so the family could view them on any screen without printing them.
distractor_rationale: electric describes something powered by electricity, not the format in which image files are stored
electronic refers to devices or systems using electronic circuits, not the file format of stored photos
wireless describes a connection without cables, not the nature of how image files are formatted and stored

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The software engineer spent three days fixing the ___ in the program that was causing it to crash whenever users tried to save their work.
distractor_rationale: data refers to stored information or facts, not the written programming instructions that a software engineer fixes to stop crashes
design refers to the visual layout or plan of something, not the written programming instructions responsible for a software crash
device refers to a physical piece of hardware, not the written programming instructions that an engineer edits to repair a program

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The company collects ___ about how long users spend on each page so that it can improve the website experience.
distractor_rationale: design refers to the visual appearance or structure of something, not the statistical information collected about user behaviour
code refers to written programming instructions, not the measurable information gathered about how users interact with pages
signal refers to a transmitted electronic impulse, not the recorded information about the time users spend on pages

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The graphic designer was asked to create a clean, modern ___ for the company's new website so that visitors would find it easy to navigate.
distractor_rationale: device refers to a physical piece of hardware, not the visual layout and structure that a graphic designer creates for a website
data refers to collected information or statistics, not the visual and structural plan that a graphic designer produces
download refers to the act of transferring files from the internet, not the visual layout created by a graphic designer

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: My phone has a ___ camera on the front. (DIGIT)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: She pressed the ___ on the screen to open the app. (BUTTON)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The ___ of the new website took the team several weeks to finish. (DESIGN)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: You need a strong internet ___ to stream videos without any interruptions. (CONNECT)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The software update improved the ___ of data between the app and the cloud server. (DOWNLOAD)
